prompt:
Subject:
A telephone booth in the sound of rain

Person/Expression:
A young woman with wet black hair, natural and glossy makeup, slightly sleepy and mysterious eyes, naturally shiny lips, and a calm look at the camera. Wet bangs and hair tips hang over her cheeks and forehead, creating a quiet sexiness and transparent atmosphere.

Clothing/Pose:
Wears a light black summer outer layer slightly off the shoulder. The inner layer is a brown-beige deep V-neck thin sleeveless top or camisole dress style, summery, cool, and elegant without excessive exposure. A natural pose leaning forward slightly with one hand holding the receiver of a public phone to her ear.

Background/Light:
A rainy night inside an old public telephone booth. Raindrops on the glass, blurred streetlights outside, car lights, and neon reflections. A humid urban nightscape where warm streetlights and pale blue night light mix. The telephone and information boards are fictional designs; no real logos or readable text.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition, upper body portrait, subject placed slightly to the right of the center. The telephone is on the left to show the depth of the narrow booth. 35mm-50mm lens, close-up shot, shallow depth of field, background softly blurred. A cinematic composition with reflections seen through the raindrops on the glass.

Texture/Style:
High definition, 4K quality, realistic AI portrait, the texture of wet hair strands, raindrop reflections, natural skin texture, and a photographic feel where pores and texture look natural. Dark film photo style, cinematic lighting, humid urban photography without excessive processing. Carefully expresses the damp air typical of a summer night.
